note: i18n hardcoded violations — surviving debt only. Auto-prunes on every gate run: as soon as a literal is wrapped in t(), the entry vanishes from this file. New entries are NEVER auto-added — a failing run reports them but leaves this file untouched. To force a rebuild (e.g. after a tool refactor that shifts line numbers), run: bun scripts/check-i18n-hardcoded.ts --update-baseline
